title: Garlicky Velvety Jamaican Green Beans Stew
description: A rich, comforting Jamaican green beans stew infused with aromatic garlic and finished with a velvety glaze.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and scotch bonnet peppers; cook for another minute.
Add flour and cocoa powder; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Gradually add stock, whisking continuously to prevent lumps.
Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add green beans to the saucepan and simmer for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until tender.
Stir in brown sugar to create the velvety glaze.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
